name: Praline Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix Graham cracker crumbs with melted margarine until combined.
3. Add brown sugar and pecans; stir until evenly distributed.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk eggs and sugar together.
5. Stir in cream cheese, flour, and vanilla until smooth.
6. Pour the mixture into a baking dish.
7. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until set.
8. Garnish with maple syrup and pecan halves before serving.
